response.overview: Experience the joy of sharing these wonderful colorful characters with your children - for that special magic only Disney can bring!  Sampler Includes:  - "Bare Necessities" (from "The Jungle Book"; as seen on "Disney Sing Along Songs - The Bare Necessities") - "Do the Rat Thing" clip (from "Aladdin the Series"; as seen on "Disney Princess Collection- Jasmine's Enchanted Tales - Jasmine's Wish") [incorrectly listed as "Elemental, My Dear Jasmine" on the cover] - "Old MacDonald" (from "The Alvin Show"; as seen on "Alvin and the Chipmunks Sing-Alongs - Ragtime Cowboy Joe") - "Rumbly in My Tumbly" (from "Winnie the Pooh and the Honey Tree" Winnie the Pooh Storybook Classics video) - "If You're Happy and You Know It" & "Farewell Campers" (from "Mickey's Fun Songs - Campout at Walt Disney World" video) - Scenes from "Alice in Wonderland" (as part of the Walt Disney Masterpiece Collection)
response.title: Disney Family Video Sampler
